biography: Liliane Dreyfus was born on 31 March 1937 in Paris, France. She was an actress and director, known for Femmes au soleil (1974), Les femmes d'abord (1963) and The Road to Shame (1959). She was married to Michel Dreyfus. She died on 31 July 2018 in Lisieux, Calvados, France.
name: Liliane Dreyfus
